name: Jungle pocket - best friend(again)
description:
English is not my native language, so I might use some strange language sometimes. Sorry about that

I wasn't taking creating this bot that seriously. I just wanted to create a bot for myself and to express my imagination, so I used Gemini to help create this bot. But I wanted to make it public in case someone might like it.

My school has started again, and after uploading all the bots I planned to create, I might not upload any more for a while, or I might still continue uploading.
